Model selector below text input lets you switch between available models (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, etc.)

attrs.definition: Extended thinking is a mode where Claude spends more internal effort on a problem, generating a longer hidden chain of thought before responding. It’s like telling Claude, “Take your time and think step by step,” which often improves answers to complex questions.
